pages.raw_text:
The Northern Pacific announces q
new rate on lumber, shingles and poles
from Spokane territory to certain Col
orado points. The lumber rate is 80
cents to Burlington, Vona, Seibert,
Flagler, Arriba, Bovina and Genoa,
and 40 cents to Limon. The rate for
telegraph and telephone poles, which
can be shipped on single car is the
same as the lumber rate and the rate
for poles which are so long as to re-
quire two cars is from 2 to 5 cents
higher. The single rate is 10 cents
higher than the lumber rate.


wEsrPo1T EXCURSION.


The Northern Pacific has put. on a
$50 excursion round trip rate from this
section to Westport on Gray's harbor,
Wash. The rate is one which applies
at any time from the present date
and ticket is good to return any time
prior to September 80.


Westport and other Pacific coast
beach points are becoming popular and
the Northern Pacific is making this
excursion rate in response to the in
rceasing popularity of this resort. A
$40 rate, similar to the Westport rate,
also is made by this road to Long
Beach, nlwaco and other points in the
southwestern part of the state.


FOR YELLowsToNE PARK.


The Northern Pacific has put on
through Pullman ear from Portland
to the Yellowstone national park,
with goes through Spokane on number
Q at 1928 in the morning, reaching
Livingstone at a. m, where it is
sent on to the park without requir-
ing passengers to arise at the early
morning hour.
